arts.ttl: Rumoured EPL Celtic transfer target wouldn't get into starting XI, says Lennon
arts.sum: Former Celtic player and manager Neil Lennon reckons a recently rumoured transfer target from the English Premier League would struggle for game time in Glasgow

arts.ttl: Simon Donnelly tells Luke McCowan how to cement Celtic starting slot
arts.sum: Celtic star Luke McCowan is the talk of the support at the moment after his excellent display against Ross County last weekend. Speaking on Clyde 1 Superscoreboard, Donnelly believes McCowan simply needs to keep performing when called upon, which will eventually lead to him displacing someone in the Celtic midfield.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' honest verdict on Scottish Premiership title race as Celtic travel to face Aberdeen
arts.sum: Currently, the Bhoys preside over a four-point gap and have played a game less than the Dons heading into a night expected to be filled with drama at Pittodrie. Speaking yesterday to the press ahead of Celtic’s trip to Aberdeen, Rodgers admitted that there is still a long way to go before drawing definitive conclusions on how the title race could sit this season.

arts.ttl: Celtic pipped Rangers to my signature but I soon packed my bags after Neil Lennon's 'broken promise'
arts.sum: The striker was at the centre of an Old Firm transfer tug-of-war in January 2012 but opted for a move to Parkhead

arts.ttl: Joe Hart doesn't hesitate as he ranks playing for Celtic under Ange Postecoglou vs Fabio Cappello for England
arts.sum: And now, reflecting back on his time in Paradise, Hart has ranked his time at Celtic under Ange compared to every other manager in his football career. Hart played for Fabio Cappello for England, Roberto Mancini for Man City and also Pep Guardiola so to rank playing for Celtic under Postecoglou above all of those guys and more is a true compliment to how much he loved his time at the club.

arts.ttl: Neil Lennon tells Man Utd star he wouldn't start at Celtic as he labels Rodgers' crop 'best for a decade'
arts.sum: The former Hoops gaffer says the midfield talent pool would spell bad news for Eriksen at Parkhead

arts.ttl: James Forrest shares what Matt O'Riley used to tell him at Celtic that Brendan Rodgers repeats
arts.sum: But Forrest shared, just like Rodgers, amid all the pressure of playing for Celtic, the duo would always say have ‘fun’ and ‘enjoy yourself’, as he told his pre-match press conference. On playing with freedom at Celtic given the pressure: “I can always remember Matt O’Riley, he always used to talk about having fun and enjoying yourself.

arts.ttl: Celtic exit ‘definitely’ right decision says player – Now missing the Celtic atmosphere though
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers handed Hyeon-gyu Oh only one league appearance in the second half of last season. The striker was frustrated with a lack of playing time and left Celtic Park for KRC Genk in the summer window. The former Celtic man’s situation hasn’t improved at Genk as he’s yet to make his first The post Celtic exit ‘definitely’ right decision says player – Now missing the Celtic atmosphere though appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Alexandro Bernabei's Internacional teammate shares what he's told the Celtic defender about his Parkhead future
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei’s Celtic future is still up in the air following an excellent loan spell at Internacional that has helped showcase his talent. Per Mails port, Internacional goalkeeper Sergio Rochet has spoken about what the future could hold for Bernabei following his successful loan spell, putting across a simple message to his teammate to focus on the remainder of his time in Brazil.

arts.ttl: Former Celtic starlet hit best stat in all four English leagues last month
arts.sum: A former Celtic prospect recorded the highest numbers of one particular stat in all four English leagues last month
